# Celestial Tapestry of Time
## Scripture
"But do not forget this one thing, dear friends: With the Lord a day is like a thousand years, and a thousand years are like a day." - 2 Peter 3:8

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the night sky, we are reminded of the vast expanse of time that stretches before us. The stars and galaxies we see today are a snapshot of the past, their light having traveled thousands to millions of years to reach our eyes. And yet, in God's perspective, time is relative. A day can be like a thousand years, and a thousand years can be like a day. This celestial tapestry of time reminds us that God's ways are not our ways, and His timing is not our timing. In the grand scheme of things, our lives are but a brief moment, a thread in the intricate weave of time.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we ponder the mysteries of time and space, we are humbled by Your greatness. Help us to trust in Your sovereignty, even when our circumstances seem uncertain. May we find comfort in the knowledge that You are the Weaver of time, and that every moment, whether long or short, is part of Your grand design. Guide us to live each day with intention and purpose, knowing that our lives are a brief yet precious gift from You. Amen.
